---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Editor UI / UX
- [ ] Blade simulation engine
- [ ] Code generation
- [ ] Preset library
- [ ] Sound font support
- [ ] Board profiles / compatibility
- [ ] SD card / export workflow
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## ProffieOS Context

If this relates to a ProffieOS feature:
- **ProffieOS version**: (e.g., 7.14)
- **Prop file**: (e.g., saber_fett263_buttons.h)
- **Relevant ProffieOS template/function**: (e.g., `StyleFire<>`, `ResponsiveLockupL<>`)

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, forum threads, or examples from other tools (Fett263 Style Library, Fredrik's editor, etc.) that illustrate the idea.
